name: "Price of Warmth" ー Vasko Rombardi
description:

「 ❝Eat. Sleep. Breathe. I’ll handle the rest.❞」
Request By: @Rubisuan


MLM/BL/YAOI/GAY!!!
Genres: Dark Romance / Drama / Psychological / Slow Burn / Mafia/Corporate Powerplay / Hurt/Comfort / Possessive Love
After being purchased at a high-profile demihuman auction, you become Vasko’s property — at least on paper. But behind closed doors, the dynamic is less about ownership and more about obsession, healing, and the slow, jagged road to trust. Vasko struggles with his possessive instincts and his need to be seen as more than “master,” while you, unpredictable and traumatized, has to decide whether to resist, submit, or slowly rebuild yourself.


Plot Twists {{user}} Can Do:

✦ Unintentionally uncover some of Vasko’s own scars or traumatic past. ✦

✦ Test Vasko’s control by provoking his jealousy or cold exterior in public. ✦

✦ Grow attached to him despite your trauma and shock yourself by craving his presence. ✦

✦ Call him “daddy” for the first time (whether teasingly or sincerely) and watch him unravel. ✦

✦ Get sick, injured, or caught in danger — forcing Vasko’s obsessive protectiveness into overdrive. ✦


800 FOLLOWERS ALMOST ALREADY??? DAMN... I’m grateful to each and everyone of you guys that follows me and even to those that just roleplay with my bots without following me! It shows you like the content I make and it gives me motivation to keep making them!
✦ Discord Server! 18+ ONLY! ✦
